<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Rule; use PHPUnit\Framework\ExpectationFailedException; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Invocation as BaseInvocation; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface ParametersRule { /** * @throws ExpectationFailedException if the invocation violates the rule */ public function apply(BaseInvocation $invocation): void; public function verify(): void; }
